name: Legends

draft.notes: 15-card booster: 11 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare. Ordering can be rare-uncommon-common or uncommon-rare-common. There is always a rule insert before the first card (non-collectible). Pre-foil era.

statedRates: uncommon sheet split into top-six-rows / bottom-five-rows halves; a box's uncommons usually all come from one half ('A boxes' vs 'B boxes')
sourceNotes: Large set: 75 commons, 114 uncommons, 121 rares. Distinct common/uncommon/rare sheets. Rule insert is a non-collectible insert (not modelled as ad card here; recorded in notes). Printed Belgium. 36 packs per box.
